import io
import string
import list

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut start = -1
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          is_ws = true
        else
          is_ws = false
        end
      when None
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn emit(_ a: Int, _ b: Int, _ s: Int) -> Unit
  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  print(out)
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let toks = tokenize(input)
match toks.get(0)
when Some(a)
  match toks.get(1)
  when Some(bv)
    match toks.get(2)
    when Some(sv)
      emit(a, bv, sv)
    when None
      panic("missing S")
    end
  when None
    panic("missing B")
  end
when None
  panic("missing A")
end
